programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।

చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
हन्ना मोंटाना
ஹானா மோன்டானா
హన్నా మోంటానా
programme.desc: Miley Stewart, an average teenage girl, lives a double life as a famous pop singer named Hannah Montana and constantly tries to conceal her true identity from the public.
माइली स्टीवर्ट, एक औसत किशोरी लड़की, हन्ना मोंटाना नामक एक प्रसिद्ध पॉप गायिका के रूप में दोहरी जिंदगी जीती है और लगातार अपनी असली पहचान जनता से छिपाने की कोशिश करती है।
பிரபல பாடகியான மைலி, ஹானா மோன்டனா பெயரில் இரட்டை வாழ்க்கை வாழ்வதோடு, தனது உண்மையான அடையாளத்தை மறைக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
మైలీ స్టీవర్ట్ అనే ఒక సాధారణ అమ్మాయి, హన్నా మోంటానా అనే ప్రసిద్ధ పాప్ సింగర్‌గా ద్వంద్వ జీవితాన్ని గడుపుతుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
हन्ना मोंटाना
ஹானா மோன்டானா
హన్నా మోంటానా

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली

డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Justin Russo must shed his mortality in order to mentor his wizard niece, Billie, and help her get her powers under control.
जस्टिन रूसो को अपनी जादूगरनी भतीजी बिली का मार्गदर्शन करने और उसकी शक्तियों को नियंत्रित करने में मदद करने के लिए अपनी नश्वरता को त्यागना होगा।
ஜஸ்டின் ருஸ்ஸோ, மந்திரவாதி மருமகள் பில்லிக்கு வழிகாட்டவும், சக்திகளை கட்டுக்குள் கொண்டு வரவும் மரணத்தை கைவிட வேண்டும்.
మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
सीक्रेट्स ऑफ सल्फर स्प्रिंग्स
சீக்ரெட்ஸ் ஆஃப் சல்பர் ஸ்ப்ரிங்ஸ்
సీక్రెట్స్ ఆఫ్ సల్ఫర్ స్ప్రింగ్స్
programme.desc: After moving to a haunted town, Griffin and his classmate Harper discover a portal that allows them to travel through time. Together, they uncover dark secrets while encountering a restless ghost.
एक प्रेतवाधित शहर में जाने के बाद, ग्रिफिन और हार्पर को समय में यात्रा करने वाला पोर्टल मिलता है। जिससे वह कई गहरे रहस्यों का पर्दाफाश करते हैं।
பேய் உள்ள நகரத்திற்கு குடிபெயர்ந்த கிரிஃபினும் ஹார்ப்பரும், அங்கு பேயைச் சந்தித்து, இருண்ட ரகசியங்களைக் கண்டறிகிறார்கள்.
దెయ్యాలున్న పట్టణానికి వెళ్ళిన తర్వాత, గ్రిఫిన్, హార్పర్ కాలంలో ప్రయాణించడానికి వీలు కల్పించే ఒక ద్వారాన్ని కనుగొంటారు.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
सीक्रेट्स ऑफ सल्फर स्प्रिंग्स

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
हन्ना मोंटाना
ஹானா மோன்டானா
హన్నా మోంటానా
programme.desc: When a show promises the winner a chance to perform alongside Hannah Montana, Amber is determined to win it. But Miley says to her face that she will do everything to stop that from happening.
माइली स्टीवर्ट, एक औसत किशोरी लड़की, हन्ना मोंटाना नामक एक प्रसिद्ध पॉप गायिका के रूप में दोहरी जिंदगी जीती है और लगातार अपनी असली पहचान जनता से छिपाने की कोशिश करती है।
பிரபல பாடகியான மைலி, ஹானா மோன்டனா பெயரில் இரட்டை வாழ்க்கை வாழ்வதோடு, தனது உண்மையான அடையாளத்தை மறைக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
మైలీ స్టీవర్ట్ అనే ఒక సాధారణ అమ్మాయి, హన్నా మోంటానా అనే ప్రసిద్ధ పాప్ సింగర్‌గా ద్వంద్వ జీవితాన్ని గడుపుతుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie

డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Justin Russo must shed his mortality in order to mentor his wizard niece, Billie, and help her get her powers under control.
जस्टिन रूसो को अपनी जादूगरनी भतीजी बिली का मार्गदर्शन करने और उसकी शक्तियों को नियंत्रित करने में मदद करने के लिए अपनी नश्वरता को त्यागना होगा।
ஜஸ்டின் ருஸ்ஸோ, மந்திரவாதி மருமகள் பில்லிக்கு வழிகாட்டவும், சக்திகளை கட்டுக்குள் கொண்டு வரவும் மரணத்தை கைவிட வேண்டும்.
మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
सीक्रेट्स ऑफ सल्फर स्प्रिंग्स
சீக்ரெட்ஸ் ஆஃப் சல்பர் ஸ்ப்ரிங்ஸ்
సీక్రెట్స్ ఆఫ్ సల్ఫర్ స్ప్రింగ్స్
programme.desc: After moving to a haunted town, Griffin and his classmate Harper discover a portal that allows them to travel through time. Together, they uncover dark secrets while encountering a restless ghost.
एक प्रेतवाधित शहर में जाने के बाद, ग्रिफिन और हार्पर को समय में यात्रा करने वाला पोर्टल मिलता है। जिससे वह कई गहरे रहस्यों का पर्दाफाश करते हैं।
பேய் உள்ள நகரத்திற்கு குடிபெயர்ந்த கிரிஃபினும் ஹார்ப்பரும், அங்கு பேயைச் சந்தித்து, இருண்ட ரகசியங்களைக் கண்டறிகிறார்கள்.
దెయ్యాలున్న పట్టణానికి వెళ్ళిన తర్వాత, గ్రిఫిన్, హార్పర్ కాలంలో ప్రయాణించడానికి వీలు కల్పించే ఒక ద్వారాన్ని కనుగొంటారు.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
सीक्रेट्स ऑफ सल्फर स्प्रिंग्स

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Our Ladies
programme.desc: (2019) Raucous teen comedy. A group of Catholic school girls hit Edinburgh for a choir competition, but they're more interested in debauchery than singing. [AD,S]

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: J Willy's Bar & Grille: Gordon's got his work cut out at J Willy's in Indiana - most of the food is from a can or the freezer, and they're a million dollars in debt. (S2 Ep12) [S,SL]

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart's Not Dead: Bart takes a dare that lands him in a coma. To get out of trouble, he says he went to heaven and saw Jesus. (S30 Ep1/23) [AD,S]

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Love Is a Many-Splintered Thing: Bart's heartstrings are pulled once again when Mary Spuckler returns to Springfield, but he doesn't pay her enough attention. (S24 Ep12/22) [AD,S]

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Hardly Kirk-ing: Bart and Milhouse explore the perks of adulthood when a hair-shaving experiment leaves Milhouse looking exactly like his dad Kirk. (S24 Ep13/22) [AD,S]

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On Merseyside, Sandra dishes out orders to her husband Graham, Joanne and Simon serve too much spice, and Helen and Adam plan a Michelin star-inspired night of fine dining. [S]

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: In Kent, Pete and Amelie tackle a mammoth Victorian house. In Warwickshire, George helps Michele finish the remodelling of her adjoining Grade ll listed cottages. (S9 Ep3/4) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch Friday's new episode, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host. [S]

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: And Coachie Makes Three: Coach keeps hanging around with Sam and Diane, but they get tired of him playing gooseberry and decide to set him up on a date. (S2 Ep15/22) [S]

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff's Rocky Moment: Cliff's constant know-it-all chatter annoys an aggressive customer at the bar, who asks him to step outside for a fight. But is Cliff up to the challenge? (S2 Ep16/22) [S]

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Fortune and Men's Weight: A combined weighing scale/fortune-telling machine proves uncannily prescient when it predicts the future for Norm and Vera, and Sam and Diane. (S2 Ep17/22) [S]

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Why Are We Here?: Ray and Debra reminisce about more peaceful times in their first apartment and recall why they ended up living across the road from Ray's meddlesome parents. (S1 Ep22) [AD,S]

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's on TV: Ray's family reluctantly tell him the truth about his performance as a panellist on TV. (S2 Ep1) [AD,S]

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Father Knows Least: Ray reluctantly accompanies Debra to parenting classes but then discovers that he can put the skills he learns to good use... with his own parents. (S2 Ep2) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Junior Agent: Now that Frasier's agent is representing a hot new radio psychiatrist, she passes Frasier off to her assistant. (S9 Ep10) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bully for Martin: Frasier offers his unsolicited help when Martin's boss starts acting like a bully. Roz talks incessantly about her new love, Roger. (S9 Ep11) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Mother Load (Part 1/2): Just as Niles and Daphne agree to move in together, they're visited by her disruptive, conniving mother and lecherous, leeching brother. (S9 Ep12) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Mother Load (Part 2/2): After Frasier boots Daphne's unpleasant brother out of his home, Daphne frets that she'll be left alone to deal with her horrendous mother. (S9 Ep13) [AD,S]

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Levanti's: Gordon visits Pennsylvania, where he meets siblings whose inability to work together is risking their father's life savings at his Italian restaurant, Levanti's. (S6 Ep7) [S]

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary. [S]

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Buckinghamshire's Chiltern Hills, Henry Cole uncovers an anvil and Simon O'Brien finds an old dresser, which he thinks could become a wildlife sanctuary for birds and insects. (S4 Ep25) [AD,S]

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Buckinghamshire's Chiltern Hills, Henry Cole uncovers an anvil and Simon O'Brien finds an old dresser, which he thinks could become a wildlife sanctuary for birds and insects. (S4 Ep25) [AD,S]

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers head to the World Heritage listed Durham Cathedral. Matt goes on an underwater treasure hunt and the whole family try out as choristers. (S1 Ep3/4) [AD,S]

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers. [S]

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Mission to the Moon
programme.desc: In the international race to the moon, the Norwegian mission is led by brilliant inventor Reodor from the village of Flaklypa. With Louis the Magpie as the brave astronaut, what could possibly go wrong? Quite a bit, actually – on the daring mission, secret passengers are discovered, hidden agendas are revealed, and nothing seems to work out the way it was planned. Louis and his friend Luca the Hedgehog are in for some surprises on their trip to the moon. The third film in the stop-motion trilogy featuring the beloved characters from the Flaklypa universe.

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Four crazy anti-heroes, one pawsome adventure. Join special-agent Marnie and her friends as they team up and fight crime. Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin manages to convince the pack elders to let him sit Howlington Academy’s entrance test. Freddy must use all his poodle wits- and his best friend Batty’s help!- to win a place at the historically wolf-only academy.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s the first day of school, and Freddy immediately comes into conflict with bully Ivan, who blackmails him into stealing the sacred moonstone! But when Batty is exposed to the moonstone, she’s turned into a human girl!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy attempts to teach Batty how to be human, while searching for a cure for her new form. A class assignment to capture the mysterious ‘Golden Horn’ and prove who the ‘alpha’ wolf is goes awry when a wilderwolf attacks!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy becomes convinced that there’s a wilderwolf at Howlington, and launches a daring investigation to prove that it’s the school accountant, Mr Sminch. Howlington gets a new teacher, the super cool and charming Ric Rawls.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids are struck down by a flea infestation, and Freddy and Batty are tasked with tracking down the mysterious Doog, keeper of the Fleaminator, the most powerful flea treatment known to dog, before they’re all expelled!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids head out on their first excursion to Night Patrol HQ. Freddy gets pulled into Scarlet’s world as she gets closer to the truth about werewolves and the two bond when they get stuck in the forest while tracking a wolf.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s Howloween, and Howlington is on lockdown. But when the students stage a play that goes wrong and the lockdown is disrupted, it will be up to the kids to save the grown-ups from themselves - including Principal Pincus!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy and Ivan have failed their runes exam and have to do it over - or they won’t be allowed to attend the Doom Wolves concert. But their study session ends up putting themselves, and the Doom Wolves, in grave danger!

programme.title: Back to the Sea
programme.desc: When little fish Kevin is swept up in a net and taken from his home in the vast oceans to the small glass fish tank of a restaurant, he must find a way to escape and make his way back home.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: Frankie and Sophie challenge newcomers Zac and Charlie to an epic sled race.

programme.title: Son of Bigfoot
programme.desc: A teenage boy journeys to find his missing father only to discover that he's actually Bigfoot.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: The lovable Ozzy’s pampered life is thrown into turmoil after his family drops him at Blue Creek before their vacation. Ozzy quickly learns that Blue Creek is a dog prison and he’ll need to rely on some new friends to help him break out and get back home.

programme.title: Stardog & Turbocat
programme.desc: A loyal dog and a vigilante cat embark on a space age voyage to find their way home.

programme.title: Charlie Countryman
programme.desc: While travelling abroad, a guy falls for a Romanian beauty whose unreachable heart has its origins in her violent, charismatic ex.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon works with a nuclear physicist to solve a murder and prevent a terrorist act against the Vatican during one of the significant events within the church.

programme.title: King Arthur: Legend Of The Sword
King Arthur: Legend Of The Sword
The Legends of CHIMA
programme.desc: Laval the Lion and Cragger the Crocodile are the best of friends. But when young Cragger becomes king of the Crocodiles, he tries to conquer all of the CHI. Former friends become worst enemies.

programme.title: Mission: Critical!
programme.desc: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerialtram - and a salivating T-Rex.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: The Ninja follow a clue to Arin's location but find a new threat, while Nya, Kai and Wyldfyre spark old grudges in their search for Jay.

programme.title: The Ultimate Object of Admiration
programme.desc: Arin nurses Ras back to health as they continue his training, meanwhile their trail leads the Ninja into more danger.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: Mission: Critical!
programme.desc: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerialtram - and a salivating T-Rex.

programme.title: Everything's Changed
programme.desc: The dream chaser's jobs are on the line now that the dream world is under the guardianship of a mysterious new hero called “Dreamsmasher.”

programme.title: Join the Club
programme.desc: After an argument, Z-Blob refuses to follow Mateo back into the waking world, inspiring them to take two very different journeys of self-discovery.

programme.title: Whack Race 2025
programme.desc: Being bored in the waking world, Mateo spices things up by organizing an off-road dream vehicle race in the dream world.

programme.title: Ley-La, Rise of a Music Star
programme.desc: Olly is feeling the intense pressure of their newfound fame, and it's starting to take a toll on him. He's caught up in the glamour and the spotlight, but it's beginning to cloud his judgment and affect his relationships with his friends.

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Maximum Overload
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: A lion cub with a broken leg checks in to the animal hospital. A new bunch of ranger trainees arrives at Shamwari and we start putting them through their paces. They need to get down and dirty if they are to pass their first exam.

programme.title: A Dog's Life
programme.desc: At the League's public relations department, Marge Stein has her hands full planning a fundraising lunch.

programme.title: A Dog's Life
programme.desc: Isabelle Hamel, a North Shore Animal League trainer, teaches Cujo and his sixteen year-old owner a new set of behaviour tricks. But if Kevin and Cujo don't take the training seriously, they may end up separated permanently.

programme.title: A Dog's Life
programme.desc: At the North Shore Animal League the cages are full, and a snowstorm may keep potential adopters away. Crowded cages also put extra pressure on the staff, who need to work extra hours to care for all the animals.

programme.title: Animals at Work
programme.desc: Six-month-old Rufus, the hawk is preparing for his biggest contract to date — scaring pooping pigeons off the court at the Wimbledon Tennis Championships.

programme.title: Animals at Work
programme.desc: Annie the Bassett hound is pushing her short and stubby legs to the limit as an agility athlete, and energetic Mr. Gomez leads his doggie pals in a knockout performance at New York's Madison Square Garden.

programme.title: Wild About
programme.desc: 27 species of turtles today are on the very brink of becoming extinct, with over 240 additional species being threatened or critically endangered.

programme.title: Chameleons Of The World
programme.desc: Discover the life of chameleons as they've never been seen before. It's a journey of discovery into the forests of Madagascar, the savannahs of east and southern Africa and the Namib desert.

programme.title: Chameleons Of The World
programme.desc: Discover the life of chameleons as they've never been seen before. It's a journey of discovery into the forests of Madagascar, the savannahs of east and southern Africa and the Namib desert.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: The universe is so big and there are so many planets that it is reasonable to believe that there is interstellar life. But the same size poses difficulties for that life to travel. How would alien races travel the vast reaches of space?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: To enter space, humans require a space suit. Are the aliens that are said to have visited earth any different? Or are they more akin to artificial drones?

programme.title: Evidence Of The Unexplained
programme.desc: UFOs appear over three of Sweden's power plants, two airports and the Royal Palace. Is the country about to be attacked by some unearthly force? A serviceman who says he encountered a UFO finally receives a medical payout from the US military.

programme.title: Close Encounters
programme.desc: In Brazil, three men escape a close encounter, only to find it lasted longer than any of them realised. Plus, in Canada, a boy investigates a strange object.

programme.title: Close Encounters
programme.desc: In Michigan, a father and son see strange lights and call the sheriff's office. In France, a bizarre phenomenon called 'Angel Hair' is spotted hovering over school grounds.

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: In 1952, radar picked up a series of UFOs flying over Washington DC. The story hits the newspapers, overshadowing the presidential campaign, so President Truman fights the UFOs with his most powerful weapons: disinformation and bureaucracy.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts unseal the truth about the potential aliens living and working among us. Who has come in peace? And who has a more sinister motive in mind?

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.
